name: training-monitor
description: Prediction-first autonomous monitoring for ML/DL training jobs. Includes domain skills for GRPO/RL, distributed training, Kubernetes, and W&B.

plugins.name: training-supervisor
plugins.description: Qualitative-first autonomous supervision for ML/DL training jobs. Orchestrates sub-agents for parallel job monitoring and anomaly investigation. Includes domain skills for GRPO/RL, distributed training, Kubernetes, and W&B.
